_readme: Organisations that walk data is sourced from. Keyed by orgSlug, which is referenced by every walk's `source.orgSlug` field. Adding a new source: add an entry here, then reference its slug in the walk's source object. The name + url here are the ones displayed in the UI (e.g. 'Saturday Walkers Club' as the author, the url as the publisher link). For book sources, omit `url` or point it at an authoritative landing page (publisher / bookshop).

rough-guide-walks-london-south-east-3rd.name: The Rough Guide to Walks in London & the South East
